steps.title: Convert percentage statements to equations
steps.content: The statement that $a$ is 4,200% of $c$ translates to: $$a = \frac{4200}{100} \cdot c = 42c$$ The statement that $c$ is 25% of $b$ translates to: $$c = \frac{25}{100} \cdot b = 0.25b$$

steps.title: Express b in terms of c
Calculate a - b and solve for w
steps.content: Substitute $a = 42c$ and $b = 4c$: $$a - b = 42c - 4c = 38c$$ Since $a - b = wc$: $$38c = wc$$ Dividing by $c$ (which is positive): $$w = 38$$
